title: Construct access tracks
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Construct access tracks demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for construction of access track

pcs.text: Confirm construction details and work sequence with construction plans and supervisor

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm construction details and work sequence with construction plans and supervisor.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate survey pegs and site indicators on work site.
